'''IntelStar Company''' was a highly successful company that specialized in the creation of [[Hyperdrive/Legends|hyperdrive]] prime components, as well as navigation and [[Sensor/Legends|sensor]] arrays. The company sold to eleven different hyperdrive builders and became very wealthy. As a result, the company used its finances to sponsor the creation of the [[Corporate Sector Authority/Legends|Corporate Sector Authority]]. IntelStar was one of the original [[contributing sponsor]]s.<ref name="HSCS" />
